Based in Nigeria
ANSELEM UDUAK
Founder · LEMEFFECT — Where Creativity Meets Impact

LEMEFFECT is the creative brand of Anselem Uduak — a multi-disciplinary visual professional with over 7 years of experience in Graphic Design and 3 years in Photography, Videography, and Video Editing.

At LEMEFFECT, design isn't just about putting visuals together — it's about telling your brand story in a way that grabs attention, drives action, and leaves a lasting impression. Every project is built with professionalism, design principles, and quality control to ensure the final output isn't just beautiful, but impactful.

Services

WHAT I DO

✦
Graphic Design

Brand identity, logos, flyers, social media visuals, print design — built to communicate and convert.

◉
Photography

Event coverage, portraits, product photography — every frame composed with intention and emotion.

▶
Videography

Event films, corporate videos, documentaries — cinematic storytelling from a single camera or full crew.

◈
Video Editing

Post-production, colour grading, motion graphics, reels — raw footage transformed into polished content.
